evidence: "If you are looking to purchase a good set of old mysteries made in a time when mystery movies were at their peak; then this is a very good set."
"This is a classic film with a great cast, the likes of which we will never see again."
"The plots are easy to follow...IF you pay attention;"
"This is not a movie for action buffs, or for those with short attention spans. This is a movie for people who enjoy classic movies with great actors, and who do not mind a slower paced film."
"It moves with all of the excitement of dripping sap."
"I could not find one redeeming aspect of this film. Maybe the cinematography is okay, but not worth rating more than half a star."
"The quality of writing in Stone Cold; Night Passage; and Death in Paradise is exceptional."
"Universal deserves no one's loyalty. Universal is home of vast numbers of greed merchants."
"This movie is excellent, has great atmosphere, and solid performances."
"Each one has its own luster and shine."
"I wish I could give this film zero stars. I would."

summary: The user has a strong preference for classic and mystery genres, appreciating high-quality storytelling but often finds narratives to be simple and pacing slow. They express significant dissatisfaction with production quality when it falls short, indicating a discerning taste in media.
